## Fast CI Results Summary
**Overall Status: FAILED** (Exit code 2)
### Detailed Results:
**LINT** - passed - All checks passed!
**FORMAT CHECK** - FAILED - 2 files would be reformatted: - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/packages/erk-shared/src/erk_shared/gateway/github/metadata/schemas.py` - `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/tui/data/test_provider.py` - 1,725 files already formatted
**PRETTIER CHECK** - FAILED - Markdown formatting issues found in 2 files (based on warning messages)
**MARKDOWN CHECK** - passed
**EXEC REFERENCE CHECK** - passed - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date
**TYPE CHECK (ty)** - passed - All checks passed!
**UNIT TESTS (erk)** - FAILED - 5,982 passed, **4 errors** - **Error Location:** `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/tests/unit/gateways/github/metadata_blocks/test_round_trip.py` (lines 193+) - **Error Type:** `TypeError: create_plan_header_block() missing 1 required keyword-only argument: 'created_from_workflow_run_id'` - The test file is missing the `created_from_workflow_run_id` argument when calling `create_plan_header_block()`
**TESTS (erk-dev)** - passed - 136 passed in 5.91s
**TESTS (erk-statusline)** - passed - 115 passed in 0.84s
**TESTS (erk-mcp)** - passed - 28 passed
### Summary of Issues: 1. **Code format violations** (2 files) - ruff format would reformat 2. **Markdown format violations** (2 files) - Prettier would reformat 3. **Test collection error** (test_round_trip.py) - missing required `created_from_workflow_run_id` keyword argument to `create_plan_header_block()`
